steps.title: Solve the first equation for x
steps.content:
Solve $10x = 110$ by dividing both sides by 10:
$$x = \frac{110}{10} = 11$$

steps.title: Substitute x into the second equation
steps.content:
The second equation is $y = 6x - 63$. Substitute $x = 11$:
$$y = 6(11) - 63 = 66 - 63 = 3$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
